description:
Dear Admin,

How are you doing ? 
I am writing to report a player using the username "AprilMayCry" for suspected cheating. 
The account in question has a KD ratio of 1.86, a win rate of 79%, and is currently at level 69. Despite being a fresh account, it has quickly reached Champion rank with a score of 747.

Given the rapid progression and the fact that the player has no prior history on this account, it is evident that they are using cheats. I have provided all relevant evidence for your review.

Please flag him and report this case to ubisoft 

Thank you for your attention

Best regards,

latest_comment.message: This report does not include enough evidence for a ban. Please re-submit the report with more evidence.
